extraction.one_line_summary: GALL Felix won from the breakaway on stage 17 to Courchevel after O'Connor set him up, while VINGEGAARD put six minutes into POGAČAR to seal the overall victory.
tactical_patterns: O'CONNOR Ben deliberately paced then dropped from break to launch GALL in final kilometer, AG2R planned team operation.
VINGEGAARD put 6 minutes into POGAČAR who crashed early touching wheels, demonstrating fragility after liège wrist injury.
CICCONE Giulio targeted early Cat 1 summit for KOM points unchallenged, controlling jersey battle through selective energy conservation.

rider_signals.GALL Felix: positive: won hardest stage after earlier polka dot day, AG2R teammate O'Connor sacrificed break to launch him perfectly
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: crashed on same side as broken wrist, lost 6+ minutes, overall effectively over at 7:35 deficit
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: put unprecedented 6 minutes into main rival on single mountain stage, sealed tour before final week
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: sacrificed stage win chance to pace GALL from break, demonstrating AG2R coordination rarely seen in opportunistic breaks
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: second place from break suggests climbing form returning after earlier tour stage win
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: third on stage, outsprinted VINGEGAARD group suggesting legs fresher than pure GC contenders
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: positive: won early Cat 1 unchallenged for KOM points, managing jersey battle through selective targeting not overall climbing
